review.summary: Workflow acceptance found that the dashboard mission-control flow is blocked by ambiguous operator targets.
review.recommended_next_step: Repair the blocked operator target and rerun the workflow acceptance campaign.

findings.summary: Mission selection is blocked by ambiguous automation targets.
findings.details: The mission-control flow cannot reliably continue because selector matching resolves multiple mission cards.
findings.expected: Selecting the target mission moves the operator into the mission workbench.
findings.actual: The mission selection step fails before the workflow can continue.

issue_proposals.title: Repair dashboard mission-selection automation target
issue_proposals.summary: Workflow acceptance found that mission selection is blocked by ambiguous operator targets.
repro_steps: Switch to the All Missions mode.
Attempt to select the workflow smoke mission.
issue_proposals.expected: The selected mission opens in the mission workbench and the overview tab becomes active.
issue_proposals.actual: The mission selection step fails before the workflow can progress.

campaign.goal: Verify the operator can complete launcher and mission-control steps end-to-end.

/.description: Open the launcher from the dashboard header.
Switch mission control into the All Missions inventory.
Select the target mission from the mission list.

coverage_expectations: launcher panel can be opened from the header
missions mode can be selected from mission control
the target mission can be selected from the mission list
the transcript tab can be opened from mission detail
the approvals surface exposes actionable operator controls when present
required_interactions: confirm actionable review surfaces are reachable
